# Copilot Instructions

## Project overview
This repository contains the landing page for sharing the 2026 5th Grade Slide Show.

## Goals
- Keep the site simple, welcoming, and easy to navigate.
- Make it easy for families, students, and staff to access the slideshow.
- Prioritize clarity, fast loading, and mobile-friendly layout.
- Avoid unnecessary complexity in code and content.

## Audience
- Families and guardians
- Students
- Teachers and school staff
- Event attendees receiving the slideshow link

## Preferred development approach
- Favor small, focused changes.
- Preserve the existing visual style unless a change is requested.
- Prefer readable HTML, CSS, and JavaScript over heavy abstractions.
- Keep dependencies minimal.
- Maintain accessibility basics: semantic markup, good contrast, descriptive link text, keyboard-friendly interactions.

## Content guidance
- Use a warm, school-appropriate tone.
- Keep wording concise and easy to understand.
- Do not include private student information in code, docs, or examples.
- Avoid placeholder text in production-facing content when possible.

## When making changes
- Explain assumptions clearly in PRs or summaries.
- If information is missing, prefer safe defaults and leave a short TODO note.
- Keep file names and structure straightforward.
